name: no-api-keys
intent: Prevent API keys, tokens, and secrets from being committed to source

checks.message: Stripe secret key detected — use environment variable
Google API key detected — use environment variable
AWS access key detected — use environment variable or IAM role
GitHub token detected — use environment variable
Slack token detected — use environment variable

config.prompt: RULE: Never hardcode API keys, tokens, or secrets in source code. Always use environment variables (process.env.MY_KEY), a secrets manager, or configuration files excluded from version control. This includes Stripe keys (sk_*), Google API keys (AIza*), AWS keys (AKIA*), GitHub tokens (ghp_*), and Slack tokens (xoxb-*).

checks.message: Never commit secrets — use environment variables
